calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-23-1994 is admitted to probate. Ping-Shun Huang is appointed Executor of the Estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-03-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.
